title: Our universe is expanding much faster than we thought - thevarsity.ca
description: Our universe is expanding much faster than we thought  thevarsity.caPhysics has been challenged: researchers have discovered something that moves faster than the speed of light, but the phenomenon does not break relativity because it involves dark patterns within optical vortices.
